traits.name: Unique
traits.text: A rules element with this trait is one-of-a-kind. The DC of Recall Knowledge checks related to creatures with this trait is increased by 10.

traits.name: Large
traits.text: *Space:* 10 feet, *Reach (Tall):* 10 feet, *Reach (Long):* 5 feet

traits.name: Cold
traits.text: Effects with this trait deal cold damage. Creatures with this trait have a connection to magical cold.

traits.name: Giant
traits.text: Giants are massive humanoid creatures.

traits.name: Humanoid
traits.text: Humanoid creatures reason and act much like humans. They typically stand upright and have two arms and two legs.

traits.name: Mythic
traits.text:
Options with this trait grant or utilize mythic power. Feats with the mythic trait can only be taken by mythic characters, who are typically characters with a mythic Calling.  
  
 Monsters with the mythic trait have access to a pool of Mythic Points and are particularly strong for creatures of their level. Many mythic monsters are either resistant or entirely immune to attacks from non-mythic creatures and weapons.  
  
 Spells with the mythic trait require the expenditure of a Mythic Point in order to be cast, and items with the mythic trait require the expenditure of a Mythic Point in order to use their activated abilities.  
  
 Weapons with the mythic trait overcome the resistances and immunities of mythic monsters.

traits.name: Troll
traits.text: Trolls are giant, brutish creatures and are well known for transforming into inanimate materials.

automatic_abilities.effect: The warleader uses their Primordial Roar and, if they're aware of the damage's source, can Stride toward it. If the warleader has persistent fire damage, they attempt a DC 15 flat check to remove it.
automatic_abilities.name: Furious Roar
automatic_abilities.trigger: The troll warleader takes electricity or fire damage

gear.name: +2 greater striking flaming shock bec de corbin

traits.name: Magical
traits.text: Something with the magical trait is imbued with magical energies not tied to a specific tradition of magic. Some items or effects are closely tied to a particular tradition of magic. In these cases, the item has the arcane, divine, occult, or primal trait instead of the magical trait. Any of these traits indicate that the item is magical.

traits.name: Razing
traits.text: Razing weapons are particularly good at damaging objects, structures, and vehicles. Whenever you deal damage to an object (including shields and animated objects), structure, or vehicle with a razing weapon, the object takes an amount of additional damage equal to double the number of weapon damage dice.

traits.name: Reach
traits.text: This weapon can be used to attack enemies up to 10 feet away instead of only adjacent enemies. For creatures with reach, the weapon increases their reach by 5 feet.

traits.name: Shove
traits.text: You can use this weapon to Shove with the Athletics skill even if you don’t have a free hand. This uses the weapon’s reach (if different from your own) and adds the weapon’s item bonus to attack rolls as an item bonus to the Athletics check. If you critically fail a check to Shove using the weapon, you can drop the weapon to take the effects of a failure instead of a critical failure.

traits.name: Versatile
traits.text: A versatile weapon can be used to deal a different type of damage than its listed type. This trait indicates the alternate damage type. For instance, a piercing weapon with versatile S can deal piercing or slashing damage. You choose the damage type each time you attack.

traits.name: Reach
traits.text: This weapon can be used to attack enemies up to 10 feet away instead of only adjacent enemies. For creatures with reach, the weapon increases their reach by 5 feet.

traits.name: Agile
traits.text: The multiple attack penalty you take with this weapon on the second attack on your turn is –4 instead of –5, and –8 instead of –10 on the third and subsequent attacks in the turn.

traits.name: Reach
traits.text: This weapon can be used to attack enemies up to 10 feet away instead of only adjacent enemies. For creatures with reach, the weapon increases their reach by 5 feet.

ability.critical_failure: The creature is confused for 1 minute.
ability.critical_success: The creature is unaffected and is temporarily immune to Awaken Totem for 24 hours.
ability.effect: Gavergash makes a melee Strike against one of the totems and destroys it with a smash from his *bec de corbin* or claw, funneling the residual magic from his recently cast spell into the totem and causing it to burst in an explosion of distracting color. Any non-troll within a 20-foot emanation of the totem must attempt a DC 39 Will save.
ability.failure: The creature is off-guard until the end of Gavergash's next turn.
ability.name: Awaken Totem
ability.requirement: Gavergash is adjacent to a totem

traits.name: Arcane
traits.text:
This magic comes from the arcane tradition, which is built on logic and rationality. Anything with this trait is magical.  
  
A creature with this trait is primarily constituted of or has a strong connection to arcane magic.

traits.name: Mental
traits.text: A mental effect can alter the target’s mind. It has no effect on an object or a mindless creature.

traits.name: Visual
traits.text: A visual effect can affect only creatures that can see it. This applies only to visible parts of the effect, as determined by the GM.

ability.trigger: Gavergash used a previous action this round to cast a spell

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

mythic_activations.effect: Gavergash ends one condition affecting him.
mythic_activations.name: Remove a Condition

traits.name: Concentrate
traits.text: An action with this trait requires a degree of mental concentration and discipline.

universal_monster_ability.name: Darkvision
universal_monster_ability.text: A monster with darkvision can see perfectly well in areas of darkness and dim light, though such vision is in black and white only. Some forms of magical darkness, such as a 4th-level *darkness* spell, block normal darkvision. A monster with greater darkvision, however, can see through even these forms of magical darkness.
